"[23] B85-021 DRIVER FOR WHI TOYT SPOKE TO INSURANCE//HAVING ISSUES GETTING 1185//WAS TOLD TO LEAVE VEH ON RHS"
"[22] PER ESTRADA TOW, NO CALLS FOR THIS TC"
"[21] B85-021 CHK W/ESTRADA TOW AND SEE IF THEY RCVD CALL"
"[7] PER ICSO, THERE WERE 2 INJURIES BUT BOTH AMA'D"

Log.Location: "SR79 S NO / County Landfill Rd - Dump"
